Deployment Validation Evidence

The latest merged-branch deployment completed successfully across Dev, Test, and UAT.

Validation confirmed the following:

* UAT backend/state configuration was used correctly during Terraform execution.
* Function App managed identity Key Vault access was applied for the required environments.
* Test Key Vault references resolved after the Terraform deployment and Function App restart.
* DIA exception notification app settings were loaded correctly by the Function App.
* Dev runtime validation confirmed TPC Log creation and D365 email notification record creation.
* Final D365 email send status is handled by D365/server-side email processing.
